[Superb Telescoping Retractor Banner](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/superb-telescoping-retractor) 5. Superb Telescoping Retractor with 78" x 33" Banner # Superb Telescoping Retractor with 78" x 33" Banner The Superb Telescoping Retractor has a sleek design that offers the perfect mix of form and function. The specially designed pole and rollers telescope from within its base, allowing you to display banners from 78" to 33" high. This design also allows you to change out your graphics quickly and easily. ![Superb Telescoping Retractor with 78x33 Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/d3acf318-0b4e-4107-84e8-d3a4c85539fd.jpg) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product: with Superb Telescoping Retractor Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 78" x 33" 78" x 33" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Overview](#f12c0591-8ac9-49b8-9491-61f353daf731) * [Product Images](#d6ca9174-d570-43b0-be26-5ceea987332e) * [How to Install](#6cea21d8-782f-4358-92a8-2dec5047ca03) ## Pick a Template All Templates Automotive Stands Boat Show Stands Bridal Expo Stands Business Stands Celebration Stands Church Stands Education Stands Fitness Stands Food and Beverage Stands Holiday Stands Home and Garden Stands Job Fair Stands Misc. Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ #### [Material](#materialCollapse) ### Superb Telescoping Retractor with 78" X 33" Banner Material With this product, you will receive the banner retractor hardware and a 78" x 33" banner. #### Material Options: • **13 oz Vinyl**: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. • **14 oz No Curl Vinyl:** High quality prints with a smooth matte finish. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. • **Banner Soft Fabric:** Matte finish with vibrant colors. [Click here to request a free sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request "Sample Packet Request") #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines.
